linker_script_verification.skipped_reason: Linker script declares MEMORY regions with ORIGIN below 0x10000; host ld cannot fit the ELF PHDR in the lowest LOAD segment for Harvard / 8-bit targets.  Vendor toolchain validation (e.g. avr-gcc) covers these devices.
